basic_details.job_title: RARI Pune Yoga Therapist Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Regional Ayurveda Research Institute Pune (RARI Pune)
basic_details.short_information: Regional Ayurveda Research Institute Pune (RARI Pune) has published the Yoga Therapist Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Yoga Therapist position. Candidates holding a Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with minimum 55% marks and two years’ experience, or a Graduate degree with a one-year Diploma in Yoga with 55% marks and five years’ experience, along with a Level-II Therapy Certificate for YCB, are eligible to attend the walk-in interview. The walk-in process is scheduled for 18 June 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and venue details below.

age_limit.details: No specific age limit is mentioned in the official notification. Please refer to the official notification for details on age relaxation.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with minimum 55% marks and two years experience, Graduate with Diploma in Yoga (one year) with 55% marks and five years experience, Level-II Therapy Certificate for YCB
qualification.details: Yoga Therapist: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with minimum 55% marks from a recognized University and two years experience in Yoga Therapy OR Any Graduate with Diploma in Yoga of at least one year duration with 55% marks and five years practical experience in Yoga; Level-II (Therapy level) Certificate for YCB; Demonstration skills in Yogic practices.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the RARI Pune recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the RARI Pune recruitment is Yoga Therapist. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Yoga Therapist post at the Regional Ayurveda Research Institute Pune.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Yoga Therapist position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Yoga Therapist position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 38000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Yoga Therapist post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with 55% marks and 2 years experience, or a Graduate with a Diploma in Yoga (1 year) with 55% marks and 5 years experience, or a Level-II Therapy Certificate for YCB.

faq.question: Q6. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the RARI Pune Yoga Therapist recruitment is scheduled for 18th June 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Yoga Therapist role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview followed by a Skill Test.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the RARI Pune located?
faq.answer: Regional Ayurveda Research Institute Pune (RARI Pune) is located in Pune, Maharashtra, with the pincode 411038.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry original documents and self-attested copies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates.
